title: Rothia
intro: Rothia is a genus of flowering plants in the family Capparaceae, characterized by its unique and diverse species, typically found in tropical and subtropical regions. The plant has been found to possess various health benefits, including its antifungal, antibacterial, and anti-inflammatory properties, which can help in treating various skin conditions and infections. The bioactive constituents of Rothia include alkaloids, flavonoids, and saponins, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. The most common herbal preparations made with Rothia include infusions, decoctions, and ointments, which are used to treat skin conditions, wounds, and other infections.

Rothia is considered a small genus with a limited number of species.
